design_philosophy: Elegance meets operational clarity. A high-end fashion retail dashboard that uses earthy tones to reflect its African roots (Vivo Fashion Group) while maintaining strict data clarity and high information density.

headings.instruction: Use Cabinet Grotesk for all KPI numbers, section headers, and main titles to give a premium editorial fashion feel. Use font-black (900) for large KPI numbers.

body.instruction: Use Satoshi for all tables, labels, and dense data displays. Ensure high legibility.

typography.installation_instructions: Add Fontshare CDN to index.html or install via npm (@fontsource/cabinet-grotesk, @fontsource/satoshi). Default to Inter/system sans if unavailable, but apply tight tracking.

primary.description: Deep Terracotta - used for active states, main CTA, and primary KPI metrics.

secondary.description: Safari Green - used for secondary badges or positive trends.

color_palette.instructions_to_main_agent: Update the root CSS variables in index.css to match these exact HSL values. Do not use generic tailwind grays (slate/gray). All grays must be tinted warm (stone/orange-tinted).

spacing_and_layout.sidebar: Collapsible left-sidebar with warm off-white background and earthy borders.
spacing_and_layout.instructions: Widgets must have h-full applied if in a row to ensure they stretch together. Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the grid structure. The top-left quadrant must contain the North Star Metric (Total Gross Sales).

cards.style: Flat design, bg-white, 1px solid border-border, shadow-sm, rounded-xl.

charts.types: Line charts for trends, Bar charts for store comparisons, Donut/Map for country breakdown.
charts.style: Minimal axes, custom earthy tooltip, no grid lines or very faint (#E5E0D8) grid lines.

tables.style: Shadcn UI table. Striped rows are forbidden. Use simple border-b for rows. Header text must be uppercase, tracking-wider, text-xs, text-secondary.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: -translate-y-[2px] shadow-md transition-all duration-200 for clickable cards.

patterns.description: Kitenge pattern - use ONLY at 5% opacity in header or empty state background to give African fashion brand feel.

icons.style: Use 'duotone' weight for main sidebar navigation icons. Use 'regular' for dense table actions.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid. E.g., data-testid='sidebar-nav-sales'.
